dashboard.title: AI Plan Dashboard
dashboard.creator: Created by

dashboard.feature1: • Product Value Extraction: Automated identification of core USP, target demographics, and key functionalities.
dashboard.feature2: • Competitive Benchmarking: Comparative analysis of market advantages and strategic positioning recommendations.
dashboard.feature3: • Content Format Optimization: Optimal scene sequencing and messaging strategies for Short-form/Reels.

trendingContentTop3.title: ④ Trending Category Contents TOP3
trendingContentTop3.subtitle: Trending Content Top 3

trendingContentTop3.tooltipInstagram: Instagram TOP 3 based on: '(Likes + Comments) ÷ Followers × 100'

aiImageGeneration.description: Generate optimized reference images based on the created AI plan!
aiImageGeneration.instruction: Set the desired style, click 'Refresh' in AI Prompt, then click 'Generate'.
aiImageGeneration.tipMessage: TIP. AI prompts can be edited manually.

friendly.title: Friendly
friendly.desc: A natural and warm atmosphere with a cozy home setting

professional.title: Professional
professional.desc: Clean lab or clinic setting with cool tones for a trustworthy and intelligent feel

luxury.title: Luxury
luxury.desc: Premium sophistication with luxurious marble spaces and soft lighting

funHumor.title: Fun/Humor
funHumor.desc: Dynamic and playful energy using exaggerated expressions

realNoFilter.title: Real/No-Filter
realNoFilter.desc: Authentic feel with unedited skin texture and everyday backgrounds for genuine realism

minimal.title: Minimal
minimal.desc: Clean and serene aesthetic with ample whitespace and muted tones

aiImageGeneration.aiPromptDescription:
Gemini analyzes the scenario and generates the optimal prompt.
Modify as you like, or try generating again if the result isn't satisfactory!
aiImageGeneration.noImagesMessage: No images generated. Set AI prompt and click 'Generate'.
aiImageGeneration.savedImagesMaxHint: You can save up to 3 images.
aiImageGeneration.productImageAttachmentDescription: Generate prompts by referring to product images (optional)
aiImageGeneration.productImageInvalidType: Only PNG and JPG files are allowed.
aiImageGeneration.productImageTooLarge: File size must be 10MB or less.

influencerAnalysis.title: Influencer Analysis & Strategy Recommendation
influencerAnalysis.description: Select the recommended influencer and optimal content strategy based on product information.
influencerAnalysis.step1: ① Upload an influencer list, and AI will automatically analyze engagement and channel characteristics.
influencerAnalysis.step2: ② Based on influencer's content types, we suggest optimal seeding strategies for multiple creators.
influencerAnalysis.step3: ③ Through 'In-depth influencer Analysis,' you can analyze channel characteristics, performance metrics, and category matching in detail to receive optimal strategy suggestions.
influencerAnalysis.uploadDescription: Upon uploading an influencer list, the AI analyzes the {{engagement}} of posts from the last 30 days and channel characteristics.
influencerAnalysis.uploadDescriptionBefore: Upon uploading an influencer list, the AI analyzes the
influencerAnalysis.uploadDescriptionAfter: of posts from the last 10 days and channel characteristics. However, posts with hidden likes or comments are excluded from engagement calculations.
influencerAnalysis.invalidFileType: Unsupported file format. Only XLSX or XLS files are allowed.
influencerAnalysis.urlColumnNotFound: The 'url' column was not found in the Excel file.
influencerAnalysis.noValidUrls: No valid URLs found. Only Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube profile URLs are supported.
influencerAnalysis.fileProcessingError: An error occurred while processing the file.
influencerAnalysis.analysisStarted: Profile data collection completed for {{count}} profiles.
influencerAnalysis.analysisError: An error occurred while requesting analysis.
influencerAnalysis.filterDescription: AI recommended plans will be automatically displayed when you select a content type filter.
influencerAnalysis.unmarkError: An error occurred while unsaving influencers.
